working_on.task: Fixed 4 Medium severity logic bugs (M1-M4) in sync flow.

pending_tasks.task: L1: Ensure SyncScheduler.triggerImmediateSync uses unique work name
L2: Improve BatchQueueManager persistence (handle killed process)
L3: Fix strictly-greater-than boundary in downloadSince query
Clean up deprecated Android APIs warnings in GeminiApiClient

recent_changes.description: Fixed 4 Medium bugs: M1 (Ordering), M2 (Atomic Merge), M3 (Batch Race Condition), M4 (DAO Guard).
Fixed Silent Download Failures and added Authentication Guard to SyncCoordinator.

errors_encountered.error: M1: Duplicate upload if merge fails later
M3: BatchQueue race condition (drain outside lock)
errors_encountered.solution: Redesigned to drain and return snapshot inside mutex

decisions_made.reason: Prevents redundant network traffic if subsequent steps in the sync chain fail.
